name: C-20 --bypassed flag records the operator-bypass marker in the trace per §2.17 audit semantics
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/consumption-trace.sh" --commit-sha abc --consulted-compliance soc2-tsc --bypassed --now 2026-05-25T10:00:00Z --emit trace.json && grep -qE 'bypass|bypassed' trace.json && echo bypassed 1>&2
